ingredients.name: Fructose
ingredients.rationale: Carbon source from RecipeContext: gapseq: glycolysis II (from fructose 6-phosphate) (72%)

ingredients.name: Acetate
ingredients.rationale: Carbon source from RecipeContext: gapseq: acetate conversion to acetyl-CoA (100%)

ingredients.name: PIPES buffer
ingredients.rationale: PIPES buffer (25 mM) at pH 4.0 — replaces phosphate; phosphate precipitates with Ca2+/Mg2+ at high T.

ingredients.name: NaCl
ingredients.rationale: Standard salinity baseline (5 g/L) for non-halophile

ingredients.name: SL-10 trace metal solution
ingredients.rationale: SL-10 (Tschech & Pfennig 1984): Fe, Zn, Mn, B, Co, Cu, Ni, Mo at standard concentrations. 1 mL/L final.

ingredients.name: Wolin's vitamin solution
ingredients.rationale: Wolin's vitamins (Wolin et al. 1963): biotin, folic acid, pyridoxine, thiamine, riboflavin, nicotinic acid, pantothenate, B12, p-aminobenzoic acid, lipoic acid. 1 mL/L final.

ingredients.name: H2SO4 (pH adjustment)
ingredients.rationale: Adjust pH to 4.0 with H2SO4 — acidophile.

gas_phase.rationale: Atmospheric air (21% O2, 0.04% CO2). Standard aerobic culture.

conditions.rationale: Temperature 74.87238968320489°C, pH 3.9838635719752222 from genomespot; shaking 200 rpm for O2 transfer

thermodynamic_checks.primary_reaction: Organic + O2 → CO2 + H2O (representative: glucose oxidation)

composition_rationale: Aerobic chemotrophy: organic carbon oxidation coupled to O2 reduction via terminal oxidases (Cox/Qox/cbb3). Recipe provides organic carbon and atmospheric O2.
